$comment: Gemini CLI — MERGE SNIPPET: merge the 'hooks' key into .gemini/settings.json (project) or ~/.gemini/settings.json (user). AUDIENCE CAVEAT: Gemini CLI is a business-tier product — individual/AI-Pro/Ultra tiers were cut off 2026-06-18 (business Standard/Enterprise only). Gemini ships official lifecycle hooks (11 events, github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli docs/hooks + geminicli.com/docs/hooks, verified 2026-07-15) including a GENUINE per-session SessionStart (fires startup/resume/clear), so CoalHearth needs no once-per-session marker here — the trailing 'SessionStart' argument switches bin/ag-pre-invocation.js to Gemini mode: no marker, and the recovery block emits Gemini's OWN nested {"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":...}} shape (SessionStart injects context ONLY via that nested field — AG's flat shape would be silently dropped). AfterTool + the trailing 'AfterTool' argument journals every tool call through the shared core (the post-tool hook is journal-only — it emits nothing). Adjust C:/path/to/CoalHearth to your clone path. Tier: wired — built + hermetically tested vs the primary docs; NO live Gemini session has run this wiring yet.
